tasks.title: Add Cobra CLI skeleton with subcommands
tasks.description: Create the main entrypoint and subcommands (init, run, sync, status, review, rollback) with flag handling and config loading from .env.
tasks.design_notes: Use a single root command and inject a shared Context struct to pass logger and config to subcommands.

tasks.title: Implement planner agent and devdive.json generation
tasks.description: Build scanner to harvest README and file tree, call the HuggingFace LLM endpoint, parse task JSON, write atomic devdive.json and trigger issue creation.
tasks.design_notes: Wrap LLM calls in a retryable client and validate JSON schema before persisting.

tasks.title: Create GitHub integration layer
tasks.description: Develop functions to create issues, update issue states, and commit/push devdive.json via the Contents API, handling token auth and rate limits.
tasks.design_notes: Encapsulate all GitHub calls in a repository service with interfaces for easier mocking in tests.

tasks.title: Build HTTP server with embedded frontend and WebSocket hub
tasks.description: Set up net/http server, embed the Vite-built dist folder via go:embed, and implement a gorilla/websocket hub that broadcasts state changes.
tasks.design_notes: Use a thread‑safe hub struct with Register/Unregister channels and broadcast on devdive.json writes.

tasks.title: Implement file and git watchers with LLM commit analysis
tasks.description: Use fsnotify to watch devdive.json and broadcast updates, and poll git logs to send diffs to the LLM for semantic task progress updates.
tasks.design_notes: Debounce rapid git events and process diffs in a worker pool to avoid blocking the main loop.

tasks.title: Develop Preact dashboard components and WebSocket client
tasks.description: Create pages (Issues, CI, Nudges, Commits, Reviews, Settings) with a shared WebSocket context to render live state from the server.
tasks.design_notes: Leverage preact-iso for routing and TypeScript interfaces that mirror the Go state structs for type safety.

tasks.title: Add design review and nudge generation logic
tasks.description: Schedule periodic design reviews, call the LLM to detect architectural drift, categorize findings, and generate actionable nudges stored in devdive.json.
tasks.design_notes: Implement a configurable ticker (default every 10 commits) and expose a manual review command.

commits.summary: Add status subcommand CLI entrypoint
Add sync CLI entrypoint using internal cli package
Updated Sidebar component styling and routes for dashboard UI
Add .gitignore to exclude .env and node_modules directories
Enhanced planner agent with retry attempts and robust JSON parsing
Update .gitignore to exclude devdive.json and embed server dist folder
Add run subcommand binary to CLI
Add script docs, fix HTML formatting, and improve git watcher diff handling with commitDiff helper
Add SETUP.md documentation with install, build, and .env setup instructions
Introduce Cobra CLI with init, run, sync, status, review, rollback commands.
Adjust .gitignore: unignore server dist, add sandbox and lockfile ignores.
Refactored main to delegate CLI handling to internal/cli package
Removed outdated bundled JS asset from embedded server distribution.
Update .gitignore to exclude devdive.json and server distribution folder
Add functions to fetch current devdive state and retrieve GitHub issues
Add compiled frontend asset file to embed in server distribution
Refactor Sidebar into a sticky header with updated routes and project initials display
Add PowerShell scripts to build CLI binaries and install DevDive
Remove committed devdive.json and add it to .gitignore for runtime generation
Update README with installation guide, binary locations, and command usage examples
